name: Daily 24h schedule
prompt: Pull next 24h of scheduled posts from Notion Content Calendar. Queue across IG/TikTok/X/LinkedIn. Run brand-voice-check on every post. Save the queue to outputs/queue/{date}.md.

name: Daily community management
prompt: Read past 24h of comments + DMs across IG/TikTok/X/LinkedIn (Playwright). Draft replies. Save to outputs/replies/{date}.md. Live reply requires Caner approval (Phase 1-3).

name: Saturday UGC + creator source
prompt: Find 3 organic posts from KIND2 customers (search hashtags + tagged posts). Save to outputs/ugc-candidates/{week}.md. iMessage Caner for repost approval.

name: Sunday week-in-review post
prompt: Compile a proof-led week-in-review post for LinkedIn (Caner) + IG (KIND2). Use linkedin-post + social-post skills. Save as drafts.
